Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using the Floatcap website (floatcap.co), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services.

2. Description of Service

Floatcap provides working capital solutions for AI companies. Our website provides information about our services and allows you to join our waitlist. The actual credit products and financial services are subject to separate agreements.

3. Waitlist

By joining our waitlist, you agree to receive communications from Floatcap regarding our services and early access program. You can unsubscribe from these communications at any time by contacting us at hello@floatcap.co.

4. Intellectual Property

All content, trademarks, and intellectual property on this website are the property of Floatcap or its licensors. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.

5. Disclaimer

The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. Nothing on this website constitutes financial advice, an offer to lend, or a commitment to provide credit. All credit decisions are subject to our underwriting criteria and separate agreements.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Floatcap shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or services.

7. Privacy

Your use of our website is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review it to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.

8. Modifications

We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Your continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

9. Governing Law

These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law. Any disputes arising from these terms will be resolved in the appropriate courts.

10. Contact

For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at hello@floatcap.co.

© 2026 Floatcap. All rights reserved.
